archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with organic elements. Deep Forest/Midnight Green and Soft Gold to emphasize charity impact, explicitly NOT a traditional golf site. Noble, premium, emotional.

headings.usage: H1/H2 for Marketing pages and main titles. Give an editorial, magazine-like premium feel.

body.usage: Dashboards, body text, UI components like buttons and form inputs.

typography.hierarchy_rules: H1 maximum fluid text-5xl to text-6xl with tracking-tighter. Overlines MUST be uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-xs. Dashboard headings text-2xl to text-3xl.

colors.background_strategy: Deep Emerald/Obsidian base with animated dynamic gold/emerald gradients. DO NOT use static flat colors.

visual_enhancers.gradients: Apply 'bg-gradient-to-br from-background via-[#0f2015] to-background' or use mesh gradients to ensure the background is never purely static. Use abstract_background media url as a faint full-width section background.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: For headers and sticky navs, use `backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/60` with a 1px `border-b border-border`. Optical clarity, never muddy.
visual_enhancers.borders: Expose the grid layout on dashboards. Use 1px solid strokes (`border-white/10` or `border-primary/20`) instead of heavy shadows. Apply 'Tracing Beam' inspired glowing borders for high-conversion Subscription Plans cards.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Diffuse ambient shadows tinted with emerald or gold, only for elevated active states.

grids_and_layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-8 to p-12 for internal card padding on marketing sections. For dashboards, use tight gap-4/gap-6 but ensure containers breathe.
grids_and_layout.marketing_grid: Mode A 'Tetris' Grid. Asymmetric. Mix at least 3 shapes. Do not fill 100% of the grid perfectly.
grids_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B 'Control Room' Grid. Strict hierarchy, dense data. 1px border grid intersections.
grids_and_layout.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, and data. Never center everything. Asymmetry creates tension.

components.buttons: Shadcn buttons customized: Primary buttons should have a soft gold glow on hover. No pure black text on gold, use deep emerald (--primary-foreground).
components.cards: Go cardless or flat rectangular. Max `rounded-sm`. Do not overuse standard drop-shadows to keep the premium editorial look.
components.forms: Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Clean left-aligned labels with high contrast focus rings.
components.tables: Shadcn Table for Charity Directory, Score Entry, Draw System. Minimal headers, generous row padding.
components.data_testid: ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, tabs) MUST have data-testid.

motion.hover_states: Lighter hue of active state. ALWAYS explicit text color on hover. E.g., `hover:bg-primary/90 hover:text-primary-foreground`.
motion.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion for stagger children entrance animations (lists, grids).
motion.microinteractions: Buttons scale down slightly (`active:scale-95`). Subtle lifts on card hover (`-translate-y-1`).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure gold text on dark background meets 4.5:1 ratio. Text over images must have gradient overlays or backdrop-blurs.

image_urls.description: Cinematic wide-angle shot of a glowing golf hole flag on a pristine green at twilight, ethereal volumetric lighting, deep emerald and soft gold color palette
Abstract flowing silk mesh in deep forest green and soft gold colors, used for premium container backgrounds
Hands planting a small tree sapling in rich dark soil at golden hour
Professional golfer in action at sunset
Group of volunteers providing food and aid

instructions_to_main_agent: Force dark mode via the 'dark' class on the HTML/Body or main wrapper.
Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom font families: sans: ['Outfit', 'sans-serif'], serif: ['Cormorant Garamond', 'serif'].
Replace root CSS variables in index.css with the provided dark theme CSS variables to enforce the deep emerald/gold palette globally.
For the dynamic, non-static color requirement: apply 'bg-gradient-to-br from-background via-[#0f2015] to-background' on the main layout or use an animated gradient background.
Marketing sections must use large font-serif headings with high contrast against the dark background. DO NOT center align everything; use asymmetrical bento grids.
Use Glassmorphism (bg-background/60 backdrop-blur-xl) for any sticky headers or overlays.
Never use generic placeholders for images. ALWAYS use the provided URLs in the media section.
Add 'data-testid' to EVERY button, link, and form input.
